nodes.label: Incremental Update (--update)
nodes.rationale: Only re-extracts new or changed files to save tokens and time. Code-only change sets skip semantic extraction entirely (no LLM); changed video files must be transcribed first or raw media paths reach subagents as unreadable input (#1392).

nodes.label: build_merge Replace-on-Re-extract
nodes.rationale: Reads graph.json directly without a NetworkX round-trip so edge direction is always preserved (#801). prune_sources is only for genuinely deleted files - changed files are reconciled by replace-on-re-extract (#1344); root= relativizes prune paths so stale nodes do not accumulate (#1361); directed must be threaded through or a --directed --update silently collapses reciprocal edges (#1392).

nodes.label: Cluster-Only Rerun
nodes.rationale: Self-contained: re-clusters, names communities, and regenerates report/graph/HTML from the existing graph. Steps 5-9 must not be re-run because they read intermediate files a prior build's cleanup already deleted (#1392).

edges.source_location: update.md: changed video files run transcribe.md first
